history.content:
<thought>
I am facing upward, with the cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D. That cell is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The cells to my right on row 07 are open floor, so the safest progress is to turn right and prepare to move along that corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is floor, so moving forward is safe. The goal is not visible yet, and turning would not help because there is a clear vertical corridor ahead while the cell to my right is a wall and the left side is constrained by lava columns. The best next step is to continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is a safe floor cell. The goal is not visible, and moving forward continues along the open corridor while avoiding the lava on the left and wall on the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is a safe floor tile. The goal is not visible, and turning is unnecessary because moving forward continues through the open corridor while avoiding lava and walls.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is empty floor, so moving forward is safe. The goal is not yet visible, and turning is unnecessary because forward progress is available while avoiding the lava cells to my left.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is empty floor, so moving forward is safe. The goal is not visible, and turning is unnecessary because there is a clear path ahead while the cell to my right is a wall.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is a safe floor tile. The cells to the left and right nearby include lava and a wall, so moving forward is the safest progress.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is row 06 column D, which is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The cell to my right is also a wall at row 07 column E. The only safe adjacent open cell visible is to my left at row 07 column B/C side, so I should turn left to reorient toward that direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible straight ahead in the same column as my position, at row 01 column D. The cells directly in front of me along that path are all free floor cells at rows 06, 05, and 03, but the immediate cell ahead at row 06 column D is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The cell to my left at row 07 column C is free, so I should turn left to move around the lava barrier while staying in the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is a safe floor tile. The goal is not visible, and moving forward continues along the only safe vertical corridor while avoiding the lava at column E and the wall at column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is a safe floor tile. The cells to the right side include lava immediately at row 07 column E, so turning right would be risky, and there is no visible goal yet. The best safe progress is to move forward into the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is floor, so moving forward is safe. The goal is not visible, and turning is unnecessary because there is a clear path straight ahead while the cells to the right eventually border lava.

<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

<thought>

MOVE_FORWARD

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is row 06 column D, which is a wall, so moving forward is not possible. The cell to my right at row 07 column E is lava, so I should not turn right to head there. The cell to my left at row 07 column C is a wall. Since forward and left are blocked and right is dangerous, the safest next step is to turn left to reorient and look for another path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

MOVE_FORWARD

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

MOVE_FORWARD

<thought>

MOVE_FORWARD

<thought>

The cell to my right is also a wall at row 07 column E, while the cell to my left at row 07 column C is lava and unsafe. Since forward is blocked and the only immediate alternatives are unsafe or blocked, I should turn to reorient and look for another path.

<action>

<thought>
The goal is visible straight ahead in the same column as my position, at row 01 column D. The cells directly ahead from my position are row 06 column D and row 04 column D, both lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The cell to my right is a wall, so I cannot go that way. The safer option is to turn left and move through the open cells on the left side to go around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
